name: Fattigmands Bakkelese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg yolks with sugar and cream.
2. Whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Mix the egg white mixture into the yolk mixture.
4. Stir in the melted butter, cardamom, and citrus peel.
5. Add lemon juice to taste.
6. Roll out dough and cut into desired shapes.
7. Fry at 375°F (190°C) until golden brown.
Note: Use 1-2 teaspoons of cardamom and a small amount of crushed citron or orange peel for added flavor.
